headline: BOJ Rate Call Eyes $40k Bitcoin Pivotal Level

headline: Nike Stocks Plunge 10% on Sales Slump

article.title: Why Nike Keeps Stumbling
article.summary:
The return of Elliott Hill to lead Nike was supposed to reinvigorate the brand. Instead, setbacks in running, product development and brand strategy have kept the swoosh from once again hitting its stride.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: SpaceX Secures AA Credit Rating, $1B Funding Locked

article.title: SpaceX Tells Investors It Has Lined Up Blue-Chip Credit Ratings
article.summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX is telling investors it has lined up investment-grade ratings from three major bond graders, according to people with knowledge of the matter, which could help the company cut funding costs as it continues to raise financing after its initial public offering.
